meaning: adj.血液动力的 血液动力学的
examples: These agents have different modes of action which may result in different haemodynamic effects.
Echocardiography can accurately reflect the haemodynamic change and evaluate the effects of thrombolytic treatment.
Objective: To observe the haemodynamic changes within ovarian stromal blood flow in patients with polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).
